invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$0.088且RSI跌破35，或融资费率Z-score回升至-80%以上（空头平仓动力减弱）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: Price breaks below $0.088 with RSI falling below 35, or funding rate Z-score recovers above -80% (short covering momentum weakens).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$1900且RSI跌破35，或融资费率Z-score回升至-100%以上（空头平仓动力减弱）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: Price breaks below $1900 with RSI falling below 35, or funding rate Z-score recovers above -100% (short covering momentum weakens).
